response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js depth, and recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience only dates from 2025. There is no demonstrated Python, RAG, vector database, evaluation-pipeline, or multi-agent framework experience, and no evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery at the scale a Staff FDE role demands.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
Deep full-stack and systems breadth (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, low-latency services at millions of req/s)
Strong engineering-excellence track record: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years of production AI/GenAI solution development required
No stated experience with Python, RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing delivery or technical discovery leadership expected of a forward deployed engineer

key_factors.factor: Missing core stack (Python, RAG, vector DBs)
Strong general engineering seniority and recent MCP/agentic exposure
